name: Hot Pot Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: A small amount of Sesame oil
2 slices Ginger, or more if desired
Cut into bite-sized pieces (boneless works well too)
2 Green onion stalks, cut into 1 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sauce ingredients and set aside.
2. Heat wok or frying pan with oil and ginger over high heat.
3. Add chicken and stir continuously for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
4. Add lemon, green onion, and the sauce mixture.
5. Stir for another 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
6. Transfer the mixture to a clay pot or saucepan. Cover and simmer on low heat for 15 to 18 minutes.
7. (Optional) Use a cornstarch solution to thicken the liquid. Serve with rice.
